params.name: ids
params.desc: 需要更新的文档ids 逗号分开

containers.name: 内部用-出版本对比报告

elements.name: 映射到开源项目的文档目录

input.script:
import json
import os

config = {
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/pipelines/{pipelineId}/builds/{buildId}/repositoryCommit/": "code-submission-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/pipelines/{pipelineId}/builds/{buildId}/logs/": "build-log-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/pipelines/{pipelineId}/builds/": "build-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/pipelines/": "pipeline-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/environment/": "build-machine-management",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/artifactories/": "build-product-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/callbacks/": "callback-resource",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/credentials/": "certificate-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/pipelineGroups/": "pipeline-grouping",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/quality/": "quality-red-line-related",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/templates/{templateId}/templateInstances/": "project-template-resources/",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/{projectId}/templates/": "project-template-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/projects/": "project-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/environment/": "build-env-management",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/artifactory/fileTask/": "build-product-hosting-task-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/atoms/": "plugin-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/auth/projects/": "auth-projects",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/auth/validate/": "auth-validate",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/market/": "r-and-d-market-resources",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/permission/move/": "migrate",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/{projectId}/{pipelineId}/webhook/": "code-event-trigger",
    "/{apigwType}/v3/repositories/": "code-warehouse-resources"
}

SUMMARY = "${WORKSPACE}/ci-document/SUMMARY.md"
ALL_JSON = "${WORKSPACE}/all.json"
BASE_PATH = "reference/rest-api"

with open(ALL_JSON, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

with open(SUMMARY, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    summary_lines = f.readlines()


def replace_summary(group, api_key, api_name):
    idx = -1
    for index, summary_line in enumerate(summary_lines):
        if api_key in summary_line:
            return
        if BASE_PATH + "/" + group in summary_line and idx == -1 and summary_line.startswith("  *"):
            idx = index + 1
    summary_lines.insert(idx, "    * [{}]({}/{}/{})\n".format(api_name, BASE_PATH, group, api_key))


for key in data:
    print(key)
    if 'v3_app_' not in key:
        continue
    value = data[key]
    path = str(value['path'])
    for match in config:
        if path.startswith(match) or path + "/" == match:
            print("{} is match {}".format(path, match))
            output = open("${WORKSPACE}/ci-document/" + BASE_PATH + "/" + config[match] + "/" + key + ".md", 'w+',
                          encoding='utf-8')
            output.write(value['markdown'])
            output.close()
            replace_summary(config[match], key + ".md", value['metaData'][3]['body'])
            break

with open(SUMMARY, 'w+', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.writelines(summary_lines)
    f.close()

elements.name: 上传内部分支
上传外部文档到github
elements.script:
set -x
set +e
cd ${WORKSPACE}/ci-document
git remote remove github_document
git remote add github_document https://github.com/userId/document-1.git
git push github_document zh-cn:new_document_${{BK_CI_BUILD_NUM}}
